summary: Frontend-only E2E test of the new headless Shopify storefront (Kaftan Queens). All major flows — Home, Shop (filters + sort), PDP (colour swatches + size), Add to Bag (cart drawer auto-opens), qty increment/decrement (Shopify cartLinesUpdate), Cart page, Checkout URL (real Shopify URL), and cart persistence across reload — work end-to-end against the live Shopify Storefront GraphQL API. No critical issues found.

issues: Radix a11y console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Add a <SheetDescription> (or aria-describedby) to the cart drawer SheetContent for screen-reader compliance. Non-blocking.
Page title is still the default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of brand-appropriate 'Kaftan Queens'. Update public/index.html <title> and ideally add per-route titles.

action_items: Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'Kaftan Queens — Handmade Indian Clothing' (or similar) and consider per-route titles via react-helmet.
Add a SheetDescription / aria-describedby to CartDrawer's SheetContent to silence the Radix Dialog a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: useProducts hook caches at module-level — fine for SPA lifetime, but if products are updated in Shopify, user won't see them until a hard reload. Consider TTL or invalidation, especially if inventory matters.

CartContext: when getCart returns null after reload (e.g. cart expired in Shopify), code removes the localStorage key (good). However it does NOT clear the in-memory state nor reset for failed network calls beyond the catch path — currently OK for happy path, but worth a small refactor to centralize.

shopify.js: Storefront token is committed in frontend/.env. This is intentional (it is the public Storefront Access Token), but worth a comment in README that this token is publish-safe vs the Admin API token which must never leak.

data-testid values for colour swatches include spaces and special characters (e.g. data-testid='pdp-colour-Green & Fuchsia'). Selectors work, but consider slugifying values for predictable automation.
ProductDetail.jsx useEffect dependency suppresses lint with [product?.handle] — fine but small risk of stale closure when variants array reference changes for same handle.
Cart.jsx checkoutUrl fallback shows toast 'Checkout not ready yet' only on cart page, while CartDrawer silently prevents default with no message — inconsistent UX.
test_credentials: Not required — no auth in storefront flow. Checkout is handed off to Shopify-hosted page.
seed_data_creation: None. Used the 12 live Shopify products already imported (palm-kaftan, palazzo-trousers, hampi-linen-shirt, etc.).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Storefront token & domain live in frontend/.env (REACT_APP_SHOPIFY_DOMAIN=kaftan-queens-3.myshopify.com). Cart id persists in localStorage under key 'kq_shopify_cart_id'. The same cart id can be reused across iterations; if cart gets stale on Shopify side, the hydrate path clears it. All 12 product handles, 4 per category. Only palazzo-trousers has Colour AND Size. Real Shopify checkout URL is returned from cartCreate/cartLines mutations; do NOT complete checkout in automation, only verify href contains '*.myshopify.com/cart/c/'.
rca of the issue: No bugs to root-cause — all 8 requested feature flows verified.
